name: Fulltech Fiber Glass Corp.
summary: Fulltech Fiber Glass Corp. produces and sells fiber glass yarn and fabrics in Taiwan. It offers electronic grade fiber glass yarn for use in the manufacture of fiber glass fabric, printed circuit boards, desktop and laptop computers, cellular phones, PDAs, and projection cloths, as well as industrial grade fiber glass yarn for use in the manufacture of insulation tubes. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
